name: kash-prompt-and-assert
description: Canonical product-test pattern. A shell step writes a prompt file. A tool step invokes kash with that prompt and writes the response to an out file. An assert-text-contains step checks the response. Plan authors typically clone this and adjust the prompt body, the expected substring, and the kash retries.

args: require('node:fs').writeFileSync('prompt.txt', 'List the tools available in this site agent.')
